text.title: Property-Based Tests From LLM-Inferred Invariants Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the code artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid example, one invalid example, and the forbidden-pattern list. The companion validator (`scripts/validate-test-property-based-llm-invariants.py`) enforces the same constraints.

example.note: Function impure; invariant uncited; seed missing.
